positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a majestic mountain range silhouette against a vibrant, hyper-saturated gradient sky. The foreground features sharp, stylized pine trees and rolling hills, rendered in a deep forest green. The sky transitions smoothly from electric cobalt blue near the top to a warm, glowing peach near the horizon. The composition is centered and balanced, emphasizing strong silhouettes and clean lines. Vector art style meets watercolor wash effect. High contrast, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Crisp, geometric, clean, graphic design.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, noise, extra limbs, bokeh, photographic, photorealism, messy, busy, gradients (unless part of sky), writing
